primary_announcement.title: Launching Open Enterprise AgentOps Mesh
primary_announcement.body: I am preparing Open Enterprise AgentOps Mesh as an open-source AgentOps control plane for governing, evaluating, operating, and auditing enterprise AI agents before production. The launch candidate includes governance workflows, policy-as-code guardrails, audit trails, model-routing controls, connector sandboxing, benchmark scenarios, public demo paths, and release evidence assets.

short_tagline: Open-source AgentOps control plane for enterprise AI agents.

audiences.executives: Move from agent demos to governed, measurable readiness.
audiences.architects: Inspect the control-plane patterns for policy, audit, approvals, routing, safety, and evidence.
audiences.developers: Run the deterministic FastAPI backend locally and extend the scenario library.
audiences.contributors: Submit use cases, architecture critiques, and benchmark scenarios.
